item.name: Golden Day
item.description:
One can't help but feel wistful when watching this faded gold wavekin weave through the water.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: This wavekin and its dull golden scales has become a symbol of nostalgic reminiscence─calling to mind the faded glory of bygone days. Despite the somber association, the sight of this charming fish has soothed many an onlooker over the years.
